title: I Show Up Daily for My Money
subtitle: An affirmation for building a steady daily money practice
excerpt: A short affirmation for establishing a daily money habit. It names the identity shift: from someone who checks in when she remembers to someone for whom a daily five minutes with money is simply part of who she is.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 50 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use first thing in the morning before the day pulls you away from your money habit.

content.text: A brief affirmation for anchoring the daily money habit as part of your identity. The shift from 'I try to check in with my money' to 'I show up daily for my money' is small in wording and significant in feel.
The affirmation names a specific daily commitment: five minutes with your money, same time each day. Not a promise of transformation, not a financial plan. A simple show-up.
I am a woman who shows up daily for her money. I check in. I track. I stay close.
Say it out loud three times in the morning, hand on heart. Say it at the moment you open the banking app or the notebook. The repetition builds the identity; the action confirms it.
Adapted from Day 50 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The affirmation works in tandem with the Day 50 tapping practice and the five-minutes-with-the-money activity.
